title: Reported air incident
summary: Public reporting described an incident in the broader area. Coordinates are approximate and publication is delayed.

title: Infrastructure impact report
summary: A delayed report described infrastructure damage in the region.

title: Regional security incident
summary: Public reports described a security-related incident in the area.

title: Border-area report
summary: Open-source reporting described activity in the broader border region.

title: Infrastructure disruption
summary: Delayed public reporting described disruption affecting local infrastructure.

title: Area incident report
summary: A publicly reported regional incident with approximate location only.

title: Urban-area impact report
summary: Public reporting described impacts in the wider urban area.

title: Airspace-related report
summary: Open-source reports described airspace-related activity in the broader region.
